what_was_done: Designed total chain swap strategy: new genesis block with compiled-in UTXO snapshot. Created 5-task implementation plan (dumputxoset RPC, remove staking height gates, genesis builder, mine genesis, e2e wallet test). Plan files written to docs/plans/ and PRPs/.
known_issues: Torus-core has no regtest mode (only mainnet/testnet)
Test binary (test_torus) has no Makefile target
locale .qm files regenerated by qmake but not committed
build/ and TORUS-Qt binary not in .gitignore
next_steps: Implement Task 1+2 in parallel: dumputxoset RPC + remove permanent staking height gates
Implement Task 3: genesis block with compiled-in UTXO snapshot (genesis_utxos.h)
Implement Task 4: mine new genesis, update hashes and checkpoints
Implement Task 5: end-to-end wallet import verification
Add .gitignore for build artifacts (build/, TORUS-Qt, .qmake.stash, qrc_bitcoin.cpp)
